summary.rootCause: Database connectivity failure. The Supabase PostgreSQL credentials in .env are invalid/expired, causing all auth endpoints to return 500 errors.
summary.uiFlow: Splash (2s) → Onboarding (3 slides) → Login screen → Submit → Error toast: "Terjadi kesalahan server. Coba lagi nanti."

credentialAnalysis.note: Password "test123" (7 chars, no uppercase/special) does NOT meet registration requirements (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char). This account likely does not exist or was created with different validation rules.

summary.passwordRequirements: 8+ characters, at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 digit, 1 special character
summary.fixRequired: 1. Fix database connection (update SUPABASE_DATABASE_URL in .env) OR use a local database. 2. After DB is fixed, register a new account or create test user via seed script. 3. Test login with valid credentials.
